items.body:
🔴 **Tool Issue** — `package.json:9`

```json
"autoPublish": false,
```

`autoPublish` was changed from `true` to `false`. For a beta release (`17.0.0-beta.3`) this should remain `true` so that the package is automatically published to npm. Setting it to `false` will block the release pipeline.

**Fix:** Revert `autoPublish` to `true`, and report the issue in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues).

🔴 **Design Issue** — `arm-cosmosdb-node.api.md:139–143`

```ts
export enum AzureClouds {
    AZURE_CHINA_CLOUD = "AZURE_CHINA_CLOUD",
    AZURE_PUBLIC_CLOUD = "AZURE_PUBLIC_CLOUD",
    AZURE_US_GOVERNMENT = "AZURE_US_GOVERNMENT"
}
```

Two naming problems with this new enum:

1. **Missing `Known` prefix**: All other extensible enums in this package use the `Known` prefix (e.g. `KnownAzureConnectionType`, `KnownBackupPolicyType`). This enum should be `KnownAzureClouds`.

2. **UPPER_SNAKE_CASE member names**: Enum members should use PascalCase, e.g. `AzurePublicCloud`, `AzureChinaCloud`, `AzureUsGovernment`.

**Fix:** Rename the enum to `KnownAzureClouds` and rename members to PascalCase. Add a `@clientName` annotation in the TypeSpec spec to control the generated name, then re-generate. Report in the [generation tool repository](https://github.com/Azure/autorest.typescript/issues) if the generator is emitting UPPER_SNAKE_CASE for these members.

Found **2 issues** in `@azure/arm-cosmosdb` `17.0.0-beta.3` (API version `2025-11-01-preview`): 1 tool issue (`autoPublish` incorrectly set to `false`) and 1 design issue (new `AzureClouds` enum missing the `Known` prefix and using UPPER_SNAKE_CASE member names instead of PascalCase). CI checks all skipped on this draft PR.

<details>
<summary>📊 Structured Report</summary>

```json
{"agent":"mgmt-reviewer","pr":37654,"summary":"issues_found","findings":[{"file":"sdk/cosmosdb/arm-cosmosdb/package.json","line":9,"issueType":"tool","category":"configuration","description":"autoPublish changed from true to false for beta release 17.0.0-beta.3; should remain true to enable auto-publishing"},{"file":"sdk/cosmosdb/arm-cosmosdb/review/arm-cosmosdb-node.api.md","line":139,"issueType":"design","category":"naming","description":"New AzureClouds enum missing 'Known' prefix (should be KnownAzureClouds) and members use UPPER_SNAKE_CASE instead of PascalCase (e.g. AZURE_PUBLIC_CLOUD should be AzurePublicCloud)"}]}
```

</details>
